title: salix × rubra
intro: Salix × rubra, also known as red willow, is a hybrid willow plant that is a cross between the white willow (Salix alba) and the goat willow (Salix caprea). This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic compounds that can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Salix × rubra include its ability to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, migraines, and other conditions related to pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Salix × rubra can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used as a natural alternative to pharmaceutical pain relievers.
